customer_name: Johnson County Park and Recreation District
site_name: Johnson County Park and Recreation District

citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
According to the facility's Program of Veterinary Care (PVC), the attending veterinarian will conduct regularly scheduled
visits to the premises annually. The last visit to the facility by the attending veterinarian was on 09-26-2024 and no visit
occurred in 2025. Regularly scheduled visits by the attending veterinarian are important to ensure that no animals'
medical condition goes unnoticed and that the housing conditions of each species is appropriate.
Each exhibitor shall employ an attending veterinarian under formal arrangements which shall include regularly scheduled
visits to the premises. The licensee must ensure that they follow the schedule for visits by their attending veterinarian that
is documented in the PVC.
To be corrected by: Beginning 03-20-2026, the facility must follow the schedule documented in the PVC.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.40(a)(1) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
According to the facility's Program of Veterinary Care (PVC), the attending veterinarian will conduct regularly scheduled 
visits to the premises annually. The last visit to the facility by the attending veterinarian was on 09-26-2024 and no visit 
occurred in 2025. Regularly scheduled visits by the attending veterinarian are important to ensure that no animals' 
medical condition goes unnoticed and that the housing conditions of each species is appropriate. 
 
Each exhibitor shall employ an attending veterinarian under formal arrangements which shall include regularly scheduled 
visits to the premises. The licensee must ensure that they follow the schedule for visits by their attending veterinarian that 
is documented in the PVC. 
 
To be corrected by: Beginning 03-20-2026, the facility must follow the schedule documented in the PVC. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
